---
title: Local increase of anticyclonic wave activity over northern Eurasia under amplified
  Arctic warming
pagetitle: 2017-4-1-Xue2017 - Gang Chen
body-classes: publication-page
format:
  html:
    title-block-style: none
year: 2017
author: Daokai Xue, Jian Lu, Lantao Sun, Gang Chen and Yaocun Zhang
venue: Geophysical Research Letters
venue_cit: <i>Geophysical Research Letters</i>, 44, 3299--3308, doi:10.1002/2017GL072649.
recommended_citation: 'Daokai Xue, Jian Lu, Lantao Sun, Gang Chen and Yaocun Zhang,
  2017: Local increase of anticyclonic wave activity over northern Eurasia under amplified
  Arctic warming, <i>Geophysical Research Letters</i>, 44, 3299--3308, doi:10.1002/2017GL072649.'
paper_url: http://doi.wiley.com/10.1002/2017GL072649
---

::: {.page-with-sidebar}

::: {.sidebar-col}
{{< include /_author-profile.qmd >}}
:::

::: {.content-col}

# Local increase of anticyclonic wave activity over northern Eurasia under amplified Arctic warming

*Published in Geophysical Research Letters, 2017*

**Recommended citation:** Daokai Xue, Jian Lu, Lantao Sun, Gang Chen and Yaocun Zhang, 2017: Local increase of anticyclonic wave activity over northern Eurasia under amplified Arctic warming, <i>Geophysical Research Letters</i>, 44, 3299--3308, doi:10.1002/2017GL072649.

[Download paper](http://doi.wiley.com/10.1002/2017GL072649){target="_blank"}

:::

:::
